  • gui package
  • gui.db module
  • View page source

gui.db module

gui/db.py Database access layer — connection, query helpers, cached data loaders. All other modules import from here; nothing else touches SQLite directly.

gui.db.db()[source]
gui.db.load_overview() → dict[source]
gui.db.load_runs() → DataFrame[source]
gui.db.load_tax() → DataFrame[source]
gui.db.q(sql: str, params: tuple = ()) → DataFrame[source]

Cached query — raises on error so callers see it.

gui.db.q1(sql: str, params: tuple = ()) → dict[source]

Cached single-row query — returns dict (empty on error).

gui.db.q_safe(sql: str, params: tuple = ()) → tuple[source]

Uncached query — returns (DataFrame, error_str). Use in UI pages.
